options.text: What if I took a design basics course this summer? Would that help me skip intro classes?
Can I get a refund if I don't like the course?
How many credits do I need to graduate?
Do you have any design basics courses available?

content.explanation: 答案解析：正确答案"What if I took a design basics course this summer? Would that help me skip intro classes?"是合适的提问，因为它询问了课程转学分的可能性。其他选项不合适，因为它们询问了不同的信息，例如退款、毕业要求或课程安排。
content.scenarioHint: 场景提示：用户提出问题，服务方/工作人员回答

options.text: Will I be able to transfer the credits from my previous courses?
Can I take Calc I and Intro to Psychology again if I didn’t pass?
How many credits do I need to graduate from the Graphic Design program?
What are the requirements for the Graphic Design program?

content.explanation: 正确答案：I’ve taken Calc I and Intro to Psychology—will those count toward the Graphic Design program？正确答案要求用户询问之前修过的课程能否转学分，其他选项不符合场景需求或表达不自然。
content.scenarioHint: 询问已修课程能否转学分

options.text: Only if it’s listed on the approved transfer course list and matches our elective criteria.
Sure, all photography courses automatically count as art electives.
You need to retake it here, no exceptions.
That’s great! Just send me your transcript and I’ll approve it right away.

content.explanation: 正确答案强调了审核流程的规范性：必须在官方认可名单上且符合选修标准。干扰项一过于绝对，忽略审核流程；干扰项三完全拒绝，不符合灵活政策；干扰项四承诺立即批准，不符合实际流程，易误导学生。
content.speakerText: I took a photography course at a community college last year. Can that count as an art elective for my major?
content.speakerTextCn: 我去年在社区大学修过一门摄影课，能算作我专业的艺术选修吗？
